title: Nike Redesign Strategy
subtitle: Streamlining the Nike digital experience to reduce cognitive load and boost engagement.
problem_statement: Nike's current web experience, while visually rich, suffers from information overload, inconsistent navigation patterns, and a lack of clear user pathways, leading to increased cognitive load and potential abandonment.

pillars.title: Cognitive Ease
pillars.insight: Users seek effortless interactions and clear information hierarchy to make quick decisions.

pillars.title: Goal-Oriented Efficiency
pillars.insight: Shoppers want to find specific products or information quickly without unnecessary detours.

pillars.title: Trust & Reliability
pillars.insight: A consistent and predictable interface builds confidence and reduces anxiety during the shopping journey.

artifacts.label: Strategy
artifacts.title: Defining the Challenges
questions: How might we simplify navigation to reduce decision fatigue for users?
How might we personalize content delivery to make the experience more relevant and less overwhelming?
How might we streamline the purchase funnel to minimize friction and improve conversion rates?

points.action: Substitute generic product listings with AI-curated "outfit builders" or "activity-specific kits".
points.benefit: Reduces choice paralysis, offers complete looks, increases average order value.

points.action: Combine product search with a "style quiz" or "performance recommender".
points.benefit: Personalizes results immediately, reduces browsing time, increases relevance.

points.action: Adapt social media "story" formats for product showcases and new arrivals.
points.benefit: Engages users with familiar, digestible content, highlights key features quickly.

points.action: Modify the global navigation to be context-aware, showing relevant sub-categories based on user's browsing history or stated preferences.
points.benefit: Reduces cognitive load by hiding irrelevant options, speeds up discovery.

pivot.before: The current Nike site presents a vast array of products and categories upfront, relying heavily on users to self-navigate through a dense information architecture, leading to significant cognitive load and decision fatigue.
pivot.pivot_logic: Shift from a "browse-first, filter-later" model to a "guided discovery" approach, leveraging personalization and intelligent filtering to present highly relevant content and streamline the user's path from inspiration to purchase.
pivot.after: A personalized, intuitive interface that anticipates user needs, offers curated pathways, and minimizes unnecessary choices, making the shopping experience feel effortless and efficient.

annotations.title: Personalized "For You" Feed
annotations.rationale: Reduces cognitive load by presenting relevant content upfront, moving away from a generic homepage.

annotations.title: Contextual Navigation Filters
annotations.rationale: Filters appear dynamically based on category, simplifying choices and preventing overwhelming menus.

annotations.title: Streamlined Checkout Progress Bar
annotations.rationale: Provides clear visibility into the checkout process, reducing anxiety and abandonment.
